title: SECTION 8 HOUSING CHOICE VOUCHER PROGRAM - 211info
text: LINN BENTON HOUSING AUTHORITY SECTION 8 HOUSING CHOICE VOUCHER PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Administers two types of Section 8 housing assistance programs: Housing Choice Vouchers and Moderate Rehabilitation. Housing Choice Vouchers: Eligible families find their own rental units in the existing housing market. Moderate Rehabilitation: LBHA provides a rent subsidy guarantee to units that have been approved and rehabilitated in accordance with Housing and Urban Development (HUD) regulations. 1250 SE Queen Avenue Albany, OR 97322 Eligibility: Varies by service Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (541) 926-4497 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 926-4497 Main phone (541) 926-3589 FAX Main phone (541) 926-4497 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website FEES: Housing Choice Vouchers: Families pay a portion of the rent and utilities, generally equal to 40% of their adjusted monthly income. LBHA pays the landlord the balance of the rents on behalf of the families. Moderate Rehabilitation: Tenants residing in these units pay 30% of their monthly income for rent and utilities. DOCUMENTS: Proof of income LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Benton and Linn Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Turn off 99E/Pacific Boulevard at Queen Avenue, just north of Dutch Bros. Continue past Dari Mart on the left. LBHA is on the right just before the Cascades West building. Services: Section 8 Housing Choice Vouchers Section 8/Rental Assistance Program Rental Listings Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - FAMILY HOUSING HOUSING/SHELTER - LINN BENTON HOUSING AUTHORITY HOUSING/SHELTER - SENIOR AND SPECIAL NEEDS HOUSING INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - FAMILY SELF-SUFFICIENCY If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LINN BENTON HOUSING AUTHORITY
